results.description: PM L1 after enumeration complete with ASPM enabled via CfgWr should pass PM validator
PM L1 before enumeration complete with PM_Request_Ack in window must fail PM validator
warnings: domain-validator:pcie_pm_json_validator: pm_l1_timestamp should be provided when pm_l1_observed = true
domain-validator:pcie_pm_json_validator: aspm_enable_timestamp should be provided when aspm_enabled_by_cfgwr = true
domain-validator:pcie_pm_json_validator: PCIE5-PM-001: PM_Active_State_Request_L1 observed before enumeration was complete (no VID/DID CfgRd 0x000 confirmed). PM L1 must not interrupt enumeration.

domain-validator:pcie_pm_json_validator: PCIE5-PM-003: PM_Request_Ack sent by host downstream port while new device enumeration was not yet complete. Host ACKed L1 during the critical enumeration window.
errors: runtime-policy: Domain policy stop requested by hard_stop_rules: pcie_pm_json_validator -> PCIE5-PM-001: PM_Active_State_Request_L1 observed before enumeration was complete (no VID/DID CfgRd 0x000 confirmed). PM L1 must not interrupt enumeration. (rules: pcie-pm)

runtime-policy: Domain policy stop requested by hard_stop_rules: pcie_pm_json_validator -> PCIE5-PM-003: PM_Request_Ack sent by host downstream port while new device enumeration was not yet complete. Host ACKed L1 during the critical enumeration window. (rules: pcie-pm)

results.description: Hot-plug PASS scenario: 8.7s gap, ASPM disabled, GL9767 at 5G should pass hot-plug validator
Fast MUX switch (6us) with PM L1 before enum and stale AER must fail hot-plug validator
warnings: domain-validator:pcie_hotplug_json_validator: PCIE5-HP-004: time_surprise_down_to_first_cfgrd_ms=5.5ms is below the recommended minimum of 500.0ms. OS hot-plug remove sequence may not have completed before new device enumeration started.
domain-validator:pcie_hotplug_json_validator: PCIE5-HP-006: Upstream TS1 advertises 16.0 GT/s but new device max is 5.0 GT/s. Possible MUX switching artifact or residual signal from previous device.

domain-validator:pcie_hotplug_json_validator: PCIE5-HP-001: PM_Active_State_Request_L1 observed before new device enumeration was complete (before first CfgRd 0x000 VID/DID). PM L1 must not interrupt enumeration.
domain-validator:pcie_hotplug_json_validator: PCIE5-HP-002: PM_Request_Ack sent by host downstream port before new device VID/DID was read. Host ACKed L1 during the critical enumeration window.

domain-validator:pcie_hotplug_json_validator: PCIE5-HP-003: AER status registers were not cleared before new device enumeration. Stale AER error bits from the previous device removal must be cleared first.
errors: runtime-policy: Domain policy stop requested by hard_stop_rules: pcie_hotplug_json_validator -> PCIE5-HP-001: PM_Active_State_Request_L1 observed before new device enumeration was complete (before first CfgRd 0x000 VID/DID). PM L1 must not interrupt enumeration. (rules: pcie-hotplug)

runtime-policy: Domain policy stop requested by hard_stop_rules: pcie_hotplug_json_validator -> PCIE5-HP-002: PM_Request_Ack sent by host downstream port before new device VID/DID was read. Host ACKed L1 during the critical enumeration window. (rules: pcie-hotplug)

runtime-policy: Domain policy stop requested by hard_stop_rules: pcie_hotplug_json_validator -> PCIE5-HP-003: AER status registers were not cleared before new device enumeration. Stale AER error bits from the previous device removal must be cleared first. (rules: pcie-hotplug)

results.description: Compliant GL9767 config space: VID/DID present, MSI enabled, LTR and L1 PM Substates configured
Noncompliant: VID/DID never observed (FFFF:FFFF) but enumeration claimed complete
warnings: domain-validator:pcie_cfgspace_json_validator: PCIE5-CFG-002: bar_sizing_observed=false but enumeration_sequence_complete=true. BAR sizing probe (CfgWr FFFFFFFF → CfgRd → CfgWr address) evidence is missing.

domain-validator:pcie_cfgspace_json_validator: PCIE5-CFG-003: capability_chain_traversed=false; PCIe Extended Capability pointer should be read before any extended capability (offset >= 0x100) is accessed.

domain-validator:pcie_cfgspace_json_validator: PCIE5-CFG-004: link_control_read_before_write=false; Link Control (0x090) write was not preceded by a read. Bare write risks overwriting ASPM, speed, or width bits.
domain-validator:pcie_cfgspace_json_validator: PCIE5-CFG-005: bus_master_enabled=false; Bus Master Enable (Command bit2) must be set before any DMA (device-initiated MRd/MWr) is expected.

domain-validator:pcie_cfgspace_json_validator: PCIE5-CFG-012: subsystem_vidpid_read=false; Subsystem VID/ID (CfgRd 0x02C) was not observed during enumeration. Platform-level device identity is unconfirmed.
domain-validator:pcie_cfgspace_json_validator: PCIE5-CFG-001: enumeration_sequence_complete=true but vidpid_read_observed=false. VID/DID CfgRd 0x000 is mandatory before claiming enumeration complete.

domain-validator:pcie_cfgspace_json_validator: PCIE5-CFG-006: memory_space_enabled=false but enumeration_sequence_complete=true. Memory Space Enable (Command bit1) must be set before MRd/MWr to BAR space.
domain-validator:pcie_cfgspace_json_validator: PCIE5-CFG-013: class_code_value is all-zeros or all-F; device class cannot be determined. Verify CfgRd 0x008 returned a valid class code.
errors: runtime-policy: Domain policy stop requested by hard_stop_rules: pcie_cfgspace_json_validator -> PCIE5-CFG-001: enumeration_sequence_complete=true but vidpid_read_observed=false. VID/DID CfgRd 0x000 is mandatory before claiming enumeration complete. (rules: pcie-cfgspace)

runtime-policy: Domain policy stop requested by hard_stop_rules: pcie_cfgspace_json_validator -> PCIE5-CFG-006: memory_space_enabled=false but enumeration_sequence_complete=true. Memory Space Enable (Command bit1) must be set before MRd/MWr to BAR space. (rules: pcie-cfgspace)

runtime-policy: Domain policy stop requested by hard_stop_rules: pcie_cfgspace_json_validator -> PCIE5-CFG-013: class_code_value is all-zeros or all-F; device class cannot be determined. Verify CfgRd 0x008 returned a valid class code. (rules: pcie-cfgspace)

results.description: Compliant PM: D3hot with Transactions Pending=0, Trst observed, L1 PM Substates configured
warnings: domain-validator:pcie_pm_json_validator: pm_l1_timestamp should be provided when pm_l1_observed = true
domain-validator:pcie_pm_json_validator: aspm_enable_timestamp should be provided when aspm_enabled_by_cfgwr = true
domain-validator:pcie_pm_json_validator: vidpid_read_timestamp should be provided when enumeration_complete = true
domain-validator:pcie_pm_json_validator: PCIE5-PM-005: l1_cycle_count=4 > 3 after enumeration; excessive idle timer sensitivity may warrant review.

results.description: Noncompliant hot-plug: SlotCtl written before CommandCompleted, T_Power_Up=50ms
warnings: domain-validator:pcie_hotplug_json_validator: PCIE5-HP-009: t_power_up_ms=50.0ms is below 100ms minimum. PERST# must not be de-asserted until slot power has been stable for ≥100ms.
domain-validator:pcie_hotplug_json_validator: PCIE5-HP-012: dllsc_triggered_enumeration=false but new device CfgRd was seen; DLLSC (Slot Status bit8) should be the trigger for starting enumeration.
domain-validator:pcie_hotplug_json_validator: PCIE5-HP-014: attention_indicator_cleared_after_enum=false; Attention Indicator should be set to Off after successful hot-add enumeration.

domain-validator:pcie_hotplug_json_validator: PCIE5-HP-011: command_completed_before_next_cmd=false. A Slot Control write was issued before the previous CommandCompleted=1 in Slot Status. This is a spec violation that can cause the HPC state machine to malfunction.
errors: runtime-policy: Domain policy stop requested by hard_stop_rules: pcie_hotplug_json_validator -> PCIE5-HP-011: command_completed_before_next_cmd=false. A Slot Control write was issued before the previous CommandCompleted=1 in Slot Status. This is a spec violation that can cause the HPC state machine to malfunction. (rules: pcie-hotplug)

results.description: Compliant AER: Surprise Down logged, registers cleared, low correctable count
Noncompliant AER: Surprise Down not logged and registers not cleared before new enumeration
warnings: domain-validator:pcie_aer_json_validator: PCIE5-AER-005: surprise_down_observed=true but aer_registers_cleared=false. Stale AER status bits (Reg=0x104, 0x110) will affect next enumeration session.
domain-validator:pcie_aer_json_validator: PCIE5-AER-003: surprise_down_observed=true but aer_surprise_down_logged=false. Surprise Down Error (AER Uncorrectable bit5) must be logged to be diagnosable.
errors: runtime-policy: Domain policy stop requested by hard_stop_rules: pcie_aer_json_validator -> PCIE5-AER-003: surprise_down_observed=true but aer_surprise_down_logged=false. Surprise Down Error (AER Uncorrectable bit5) must be logged to be diagnosable. (rules: pcie-aer)

results.description: Compliant DLL: InitFC both directions, no NAK, UpdateFC observed, no REPLAY_NUM rollover
Compliant TLP: no non-SC completions, no Poisoned TLP, no BAR violations
